channel.title: Feature on Clusters and Climate
channel.description: Recent content in Feature on Clusters and Climate

item.title: Indonesian Throughflow: River in the ocean that affects Indian Monsoon rainfall
item.description: Climate is one of the most discussed and followed topics around the world. There are many climatic phenomena such as El Nino – La Nina, and their effects are well known worldwide.

item.title: Quirky Quakes - A tale of Earthquakes
item.description: Life in Sapporo I’ve been living in Sapporo, the capital of Hokkaido, for many years now. Hokkaido is known for its pristine forests, breathtaking natural beauty, dairy products, and fresh seafood.
